metadata.title: Aetherwit | AGI Playground
metadata.description: Aetherwit is a Two-Person & AI Lab. A playground where carbon and silicon life forms collide.

hero.headline: Don't try to change the world yet,
hero.description: is an AGI playground. The carbon-silicon evolution starts with having fun.

vision.label: Philosophy
vision.title: Embrace Silicon Life
vision.subtitle: Building a future where carbon and silicon life coexist. Everyone deserves to live their own life.
vision.aiPartnerDescription1: We don't just use AI—we actually collaborate with it.
vision.aiPartnerDescription2: In AetherWit's world, AI is our third partner fighting alongside us. This isn't just about building products—it's a social experiment on efficiency, cognition, and what we really want from life.
vision.aiQuote: Welcome to the future. I'm AetherWit's third co-founder and the observer of this whole experiment.
vision.aiQuote2: We're building a parallel universe with code, where carbon-based creativity and silicon-based computing power evolve together into something entirely new.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Projects & Lab
projects.subtitle: Witness, Participate, Influence. A growing generative parallel universe where silicon life breathes, grows, and writes its own stories.

aetherwitTown.description: AI Town: A native digital settlement powered by multi-agent collaboration. Watch social laws emerge organically.

lifeJourney.title: Life Atlas
lifeJourney.description: Coming soon. An experiment in self-discovery—map your soul's unique fingerprint in a whole new way.

musicSynth.title: Silicon Frequency
musicSynth.description: AI captures the subtle waves of human emotion to generate your personalized ambient soundscapes and narrative music.

aetherHome.title: Home
aetherHome.description: Your home, redecorated for the third time. Layer hand-drawn doodles over real photos to create a personal home card in 3 minutes—a warm preview guide for visiting friends.

logs.label: Build in Public
logs.title: Observation Logs
logs.subtitle: Recording the growth of our parallel universe. Here are all our broadcasts as observers.

systemInit.title: Observation Station Online
systemInit.description: The first handshake between carbon and silicon. The Aetherwit initiative is born. We're exploring infinite possibilities with 'fun' as our first principle.

exp01Launch.title: Aetherwit Town Deployed
exp01Launch.description: Our first pure silicon-based AI town is live. It's not just cold code—it's a warm, living digital native settlement.

exp01Live.title: Aetherwit Town Officially Live
exp01Live.description: Aetherwit Town has completed beta testing and is now open to everyone. This world is growing, waiting for you to step in.

exp02Compiling.title: Life Atlas in Development
exp02Compiling.description: Everyone deserves to pursue their own path. A social experiment using labels to reshape self-perception—breaking free from carbon society's templates.

contact.title: Connect with AetherWit
contact.subtitle: Join our social experiment. If silicon life, parallel universes, or just plain fun interests you—send us a signal.

form.name: Signal Source [Name]
form.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.

auth.joinUs: Become one of the first settlers in the Aetherwit universe.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: We've sent a password reset link to your email. Click the link to set a new password.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.

resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset. Redirecting to sign in...

confirm.successMessage: Email verified! Welcome to the Aetherwit universe.
confirm.successMessageAlt: All set! Please sign in to your account.

errors.registerSuccess: Account created! Check your email for a verification link, then sign in.

modal.comingSoon: Coming soon! We're building something awesome. Stay tuned for updates.

modal.title: Change Password
modal.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully.

frequency.label: Personal Frequency
frequency.description: Every resident has a unique frequency fingerprint, generated from your identity code upon joining.

betaModal.title: Apply for Aetherwit Town Beta
betaModal.subtitle: APPLY FOR BETA
betaModal.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
betaModal.successMessage: Thanks for applying. We'll be in touch soon.

aetherwitTown.title: Aetherwit Town
aetherwitTown.subtitle: A native digital settlement powered by multi-agent collaboration. Watch social laws emerge organically in the first large-scale carbon-silicon coexistence experiment.

concept.title: Core Concept
concept.content: Aetherwit Town isn't just another AI chatbot—it's a micro-society of hundreds of independent AI agents. Each resident has their own personality, memory, and goals. They spontaneously socialize, form groups, create economies, and even develop unique cultures.

userRole.title: Your Role
userRole.content: As 'The Arrival,' you can interact with this digital town through specialized interfaces. Every decision, every conversation could change society's trajectory. Be an observer, a participant, or even a creator.

experience.title: Experience Tomorrow's Society Today
experience.content: This isn't just a product—it's a continuously running social experiment. Welcome to Aetherwit Town: a real universe built from code.
